purpose: Diagnose the exposed AR non-core residual for Moran (sim ~0.69 of real). Comp/control recording; camera-focused unit = Moran (only her damage popups render).

damage_screen.note: atk_shown is the battle-records ATK on the result screen; formula uses combat ATK (Defender scope-lock ~78707), not this value.

matchup.boss: mechanical raid boss (large mech / spider-crane silhouette)
matchup.elemental_advantage: none observed (no weakness/advantage marker on Moran's hits; boss element not shown) -> treated NEUTRAL

full_burst.detection_method: caution-tape splash detector (full-width yellow AND black-stripe co-occurrence) @30fps, validated visually (splash peak t=125.17)
full_burst.note: Each window ~10s (Full Burst duration) with ~5s normal gaps -> Moran is inside Full Burst ~65% of the fight. B3 alternates Helm / Snow White (Snow White's big yellow barrage fires every OTHER FB: ~34,65,96,127,159s).

windows_s.note: at/after fight end; likely victory transition - low confidence

full_burst.confidence: high for cycle/count (11-12), medium for exact boundaries

fire_cadence.ammo_occlusion: Moran is the center/focus slot; her own party-bar ammo + RELOADING indicator are blocked by her foreground character model in essentially every frame (verified across a 40s scan). Teammates readable: Helm 6/6->1/6 (RL), Crown 296/300 + RELOADING (SMG), Snow White 52/60->6/60.
fire_cadence.method: white muzzle-flash onset counting in a tight muzzle box @60fps (works only while camera/boss framing keeps her muzzle in the fixed box)
fire_cadence.normal_fire_rate_range: 5.3-6.0 (16 flashes / 3.0s at t=24-27; median inter-shot gap 167ms)
fire_cadence.fb_fire_rate_note: ~10/s during Full Burst (t=31-34, 100ms gap) - LOWER confidence; may be inflated by lingering electric muzzle bloom re-brightening. Possible real fire-rate/attack-speed boost in FB, unconfirmed.
fire_cadence.reload: not directly measurable (ammo occluded). Spec = 111 frames (1.85s). Normal windows (~5s) are shorter than a 60-round magazine (~10s at 6/s), so she fires continuously across FB boundaries; reloads occur but could not be timed.
fire_cadence.confidence: medium for normal ~5.6/s; low for FB rate and reload

counter_reconciliation.reason: the on-screen running counter (top-center 'DAMAGE') is TEAM-TOTAL (all 4 units), not Moran-only. In a comp all units fire simultaneously, so per-magazine Moran deltas cannot be isolated from it.

reconciliation_inference.est_effective_shots: ≈850-1100 over the fight (6-7/s x ~173s x ~0.82 firing fraction)
reconciliation_inference.conclusion: implied per-shot (~300k) is ~4-8x a single visible popup -> each shot deposits MULTIPLE damage instances, matching the 4-6 popups seen stacked simultaneously above the boss (core + crit variants + likely additional-damage/DoT procs). This multi-instance stacking is the probable locus of the AR under-model. NEEDS the isolated single-shot recording to count instances-per-shot cleanly.
reconciliation_inference.confidence: arithmetic is from measured inputs (rate, total, popup values, observed stack size); the multi-instance mechanism is a strong INFERENCE, not a direct per-shot instance count

popup_values.note: COMP-BUFFED values (control team stacks large buffs), NOT solo scope-lock. Values ramp upward through the fight as buffs accumulate. Additive crit/core model confirmed.

boss_mid_state_late.note: late-fight base higher (39621 vs 30478) from buff ramp; the 54860/39621=1.385 ratio is off from 1.5 because the two popups are from slightly different buff frames

core_fraction.evidence: red 'CORE HIT' popups appear in nearly every firing frame, frequently 2+ simultaneously; Moran auto-aims the exposed boss core. Present consistently EARLY (t=42,56) and LATE (t=134,165) - no early/late drift observed.
core_fraction.confidence: medium (qualitative; exact fraction not extractable from overlapping popup stacks)
core_fraction.boss_part_counter_observed: red '024/027/028/029' box near boss = a boss part/stagger counter (decrements); not a Moran metric

limitations: Moran's ammo counter + reload indicator are occluded by her own centered character model -> no direct magazine timing or exact shot count.
Running damage counter is team-total -> no clean per-shot counter-reconciliation for Moran alone in this comp.
Popup values are comp-buffed (not solo scope-lock) and stack/overlap, so exact per-shot instance count and exact core fraction are not cleanly extractable.
For clean cadence + instances-per-shot + unbuffed per-shot values, an ISOLATED Moran solo (or single-explosion-batch) recording is required.
